title: National Theatre Live: Les Liaisons Dangereuses
original_title: National Theatre Live: Les Liaisons Dangereuses
overview: Marquise de Merteuil, former lover of Vicomte de Valmont, incites him to corrupt the innocent Cécile de Volanges before her wedding night, but Valmont has targeted the peerlessly virtuous and beautiful Madame de Tourvel.
